class.name: Test Cleric
class.proficiency: Light armor, medium armor, shields, simple weapons

feature.name: Spellcasting
feature.text: As a conduit for divine power, you can cast cleric spells.

feature.name: Divine Domain
feature.text: Choose one domain related to your deity: Life, Knowledge, etc. Your choice grants you domain spells and other features when you choose it at 1st level.

feature.name: Bonus Proficiency
feature.text: When you choose this domain at 1st level, you gain proficiency with heavy armor.

feature.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
feature.text: As an action, you present your holy symbol and speak a prayer censuring the undead. Each undead that can see or hear you within 30 feet of you must make a Wisdom saving throw.

feature.name: Destroy Undead
feature.text: Starting at 5th level, when an undead fails its saving throw against your Turn Undead feature, the creature is instantly destroyed if its challenge rating is at or below a certain threshold.

feature.name: Optional: Blessed Strikes
feature.text: You are blessed with divine might in battle. When a creature takes damage from one of your cantrips or weapon attacks, you can also deal 1d8 radiant damage to that creature. Once you deal this damage, you can't use this feature again until the start of your next turn.

feature.name: Circle of the Land Spells
feature.text:
Your mystical connection to the land infuses you with the ability to cast certain spells.
Arctic Spells: Circle Level | Spells 3rd | Hold Person, Spike Growth 5th | Sleet Storm, Slow 7th | Freedom of Movement, Ice Storm 9th | Commune with Nature, Cone of Cold
